summary:
The `teststop` Go CLI is structurally complete — all source files, tests, mandate, embed, and CLI wiring are implemented. The project cannot be built because `go.sum` is absent and `internal/composer/` is an empty directory that leaves a dangling package reference. The work is to make the project compile and all tests green.

Files to touch:
| File | Action | Reason |
|------|--------|--------|
| `go.sum` | CREATE | Generated by `go mod tidy`; required for reproducible builds |
| `internal/composer/` | DELETE (dir) | Empty directory with no `.go` files; all mandate composition lives in `internal/mandate/composer.go` |
